page.title: Contribute to Trace of the Tides
page.subtitle: What would you like to contribute?

form.titlePlaceholder: Enter a title for your contribution
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Enter a description for the contribution
form.uploadHint: Drag and drop files here, or click to browse
form.uploadFormats: Supported formats: JPG, PNG, PDF, MP3, MP4, DOC (Max 20MB)
form.consent: By submitting, you agree that your contribution may be used and attributed in accordance with our terms. We may contact you regarding your submission.
form.technicalNote: Each file is sent to POST /upload first, then again in the contribution form: each multipart files part uses the returned storage path as the filename and the real file bytes as the body.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: We could not complete your submission. Please try again, or contact us if the problem continues.
